name: add-codex
tagline: Installs and wires OpenAI Codex as an alternate NanoClaw agent provider, with idempotent steps and vault-only credential handling.
verdict: Well-scoped internal install skill: idempotent steps throughout, clear pre-flight/validate/troubleshooting coverage, vault-only auth with no secret exposure, and disclosed side effects matching its description. Weak spots: no skill-level version or changelog signal, and CLI tools like bun/tsx/ncl are invoked without an upfront requirements check.

highlights.summary: bun, tsx, and the ncl CLI are invoked throughout with no requirements/availability check declared up front.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere for the skill itself.
